title: parietaria hespera var. hespera
intro: Parietaria hespera var. hespera, also known as California Pellitory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Urticaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of California Pellitory include soothing skin irritations, reducing joint pain, and aiding in the management of allergies. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or poultice for topical application, and is also used in ointments and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
